subject: AP Physics 1: Algebra-Based

units.name: Energy and Momentum of Rotating Systems

notes: Mock exam uses the current College Board AP Physics 1 structure: 40 MCQ in 80 minutes and 4 FRQ in 100 minutes.
2015 excludes unscored item Q6 and publishes 35 scored MCQ.
Student-facing prompts and rubrics are structured text; images are diagrams, graphs, and tables only.

unit_classification_authority.official_framework: AP Physics 1: Algebra-Based Course and Exam Description
unit_classification_authority.policy: Official exam and subject framework materials are the only authority for unit classification.
unit_classification_authority.student_progression_rule: A question belongs to the earliest unit after which a student can answer it using that unit and prior units only.
